CreateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
CreateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.ingressBandwidthInMbps: Inbound bandwidth of the speed limit policy
CreateIpv6GatewaySpeedLimitPolicy.egressBandwidthInMbps: Outbound bandwidth of the speed limit policy
